scenarios.scenario-1: Landing page renders email-first UX and transitions to "Проверьте почту" after accepted submission.
scenarios.scenario-2: Backend delivery or verification failures are rendered as clear user-facing errors.

critical-invariants.invariant-1: User never receives proxy details before email verification succeeds.
critical-invariants.invariant-2: UI state reflects backend outcome without ambiguous success messaging.

side-effects.effect-1: Triggers HTTP calls to `M-WEB-API` from browser JS.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Client telemetry must not emit full email addresses without masking.

verification-levels.module-local: Static rendering and client state tests.
verification-levels.wave-level: Browser-driven form submission against local backend.
verification-levels.phase-level: User walks from portal to verified result page without broken states.
